.call.mdDescription: Route a call to a registered activation

mdParams.pdDescription: Parameters to pass to the method (optional, defaults to {})

.hash.mdDescription: Get Plexus RPC server configuration hash (from the recursive schema)  This hash changes whenever any method or child activation changes. It's computed from the method hashes rolled up through the schema tree.

.hashes.mdDescription: Get plugin hashes for cache validation (lightweight alternative to full schema)

.schema.mdDescription: Get plugin or method schema. Pass {"method": "name"} for a specific method.

info.schema.mdDescription: Get plugin or method schema. Pass {"method": "name"} for a specific method.

mdParams.pdDescription: Commands to run (one per pane, same order)
Time to wait for each command to settle (default: 500ms)
Pane name or ID (e.g. 'my-pane' or '%5'). Default: focused pane
Split direction: up, down, left, right
Pane ID to split from (e.g. %5). Default: focused pane
Number of lines to capture (default: 0, no capture)
Command to execute (can be arbitrarily long, handles all quoting)
Working directory to cd into before running
Set pane title (for future lookup by name)
Pane name or ID (e.g. 'my-pane' or '%5'). Default: focused pane
Max time to wait for command to start (default: 5000ms)
Keep stream open until command exits (default: false)
Commands to run in each cell (left-to-right, top-to-bottom). Fewer commands than cells is OK.
Names for each pane (same order as commands)
Number of screen lines to capture (default: 0)
Pane name or ID to rename (default: focused)
Split direction: up, down, left, right
Pane ID to split from (e.g. %5). Default: focused pane

panes.schema.mdDescription: Get plugin or method schema. Pass {"method": "name"} for a specific method.

mdParams.pdDescription: Command text to send (Enter is appended automatically)
Time to wait after screen stops changing (default: 500ms)
Max time to wait for output to settle (default: 10000ms)

recording.schema.mdDescription: Get plugin or method schema. Pass {"method": "name"} for a specific method.

mdParams.pdDescription: Session name to record (default: current session)
Recording ID to stop (default: active recording)
Path to recording directory (default: most recent recording)
Path to recording directory (default: most recent recording)
Border style: single, double, heavy, none (default: single)
Frame rate in frames per second (default: 30.0)
Maximum idle time between events in seconds (default: 2.0)
Path to recording directory (default: most recent recording)

render.schema.mdDescription: Get plugin or method schema. Pass {"method": "name"} for a specific method.

sessions.schema.mdDescription: Get plugin or method schema. Pass {"method": "name"} for a specific method.

tabs.schema.mdDescription: Get plugin or method schema. Pass {"method": "name"} for a specific method.

mdParams.pdDescription: Project directory (used to find workspace name if not specified)

workspace.schema.mdDescription: Get plugin or method schema. Pass {"method": "name"} for a specific method.

mdParams.pdDescription: Workspace name from config (default: first workspace)

.ChildHashes.tdDescription: Hash information for a child plugin

.PlexusStreamItem.tdDescription:
Universal stream item - all activations emit this type

The caller (DynamicHub routing layer) wraps activation responses with
metadata. This is the only type that crosses the wire.

vdFields.fdDescription: Optional error code for programmatic handling
Whether the operation can be retried

keVariants.vdDescription:
Bidirectional request from server to client

Server can ask client for input during stream execution.
Client must respond via transport-specific mechanism
(MCP: _plexus_respond tool, WebSocket: plexus.respond RPC).

vdFields.fdDescription: Maximum time to wait for response (milliseconds)

.StreamMetadata.tdDescription:
Metadata applied by the caller when wrapping activation responses

This metadata is added at each layer of the call stack, enabling
provenance tracking and cache invalidation.

ksFields.fdDescription:
Hash of Plexus RPC server configuration for cache invalidation
Changes when activations are added/removed/updated
Unix timestamp (seconds) when the event was wrapped

panes.PaneRef.tdDescription:
A pane reference — either a name or a %id. Must be resolved via
`backend.resolve_pane()` before use. This type enforces that callers
go through resolution rather than passing raw strings.

tabs.BatchEntry.tdDescription: Result of a single operation in a batch

keVariants.vdDescription: Screen content captured from a pane
A command was launched in a pane
A command was executed in an existing pane and confirmed running
Input was sent to a pane
A grid layout was created with multiple panes
Batch results from multiple pane operations
Screen diff after sending a command to a foreign shell
Screen content from terminal state (instant, no file I/O)

tabs.PaneId.tdDescription:
Logical pane identifier. Assigned by Locus, not the backend.
Backends map this to their native pane ID internally.
